name: amazee.ai AI Provider
description: This enables the use of amazee.ai AI for the AI module.
submodules_note: ai_provider_amazeeio_test is a hidden (package: Testing) mock-services helper used only by the module's own test suite; it is not documented separately.
consumes_plugin_types: ai:AiProvider (registers the 'amazeeio' AiProvider plugin, AmazeeioAiProvider, extending AI Core's OpenAiBasedProviderClientBase)
ai:AiVdbProvider (registers the 'amazeeio_vector_db' vector-database provider, AmazeeioVdbProvider, over Postgres/pgvector)
ai:OperationType (implements chat + embeddings operation-type interfaces from AI Core)
provides_config_action: amazeeio_ai:ensureAmazeeAiAccess (EnsureAmazeeAiAccess) — used by recipes to provision trial access
